title: Exploring Regulations
description: Browse the corpus by country, regulator and topic, read original and translated sources, and search with Iris.
_note: Timeline reconstructed from 1fps contact sheets. 'segments' are source in/out seconds (dead time excluded); the renderer time-fits the kept video to the narration length per section. 'steps' are the narration spine — each step's caption shows as a banner while its narration plays. REVIEW: edit captions/narration freely; nudge segment in/out if a cut feels off.

steps.caption: Browse the global regulatory corpus
steps.narration: Vantage tracks over eleven thousand regulations from regulators around the world. From the Regulations menu, you can browse the entire corpus by country.

steps.caption: Pick a jurisdiction
steps.narration: Each tile is a jurisdiction — the United States, the European Union, Canada, Saudi Arabia and more — showing how many regulations it covers and how many changed this month.

steps.caption: Open a regulation to read it
steps.narration: Click any regulation to open it. Vantage extracts the full text into clean, readable articles, right inside the app.

steps.caption: Browse by regulator
steps.narration: You can also browse by regulator. Vantage organises publishers by region — North America, Europe, the Gulf, and international bodies.

steps.caption: Open a regulator — SASO
steps.narration: Here we open Saudi Standards, the S-A-S-O authority, to see every technical regulation it publishes.

steps.caption: Read the original source
steps.narration: Open a regulation and switch to the Original tab to see the publisher's own source document — in this case, the Arabic PDF for hydrogen vehicles.

steps.caption: Auto-translated to English
steps.narration: Vantage automatically translates non-English sources, so you can read the official text in English without leaving the page.

steps.caption: Explore by topic
steps.narration: Every regulation is tagged by topic, so you can follow exactly the themes that matter to your operations.

steps.caption: Open a topic — Energy
steps.narration: Open a topic like Energy to see all the related regulations, across every jurisdiction, in one place.

steps.caption: Search the whole corpus
steps.narration: The Search page combines keyword search with Iris, our AI assistant, in a single box.

steps.caption: Ask Iris a question
steps.narration: Type a question — like, methane emission reduction in oil and gas — and Iris reads the corpus and writes a grounded answer.

steps.caption: Cited, with ranked matches
steps.narration: Every claim is cited to its source, and the most relevant regulations are ranked below — vector and keyword search, combined.

steps.caption: Save the search
steps.narration: Save any search to revisit it later, or to be alerted when new regulations match it.
